g.text: B. Trellis2 as a reusable sparse codec and local realization prior
The paper should show the specific model-native interface used by recursion: support, features, masks, decoder, re-encoder, and PBR export.
PS-RSLG reads/writes sparse state and masks; Trellis2 remains frozen but is repeatedly re-entered at each recursive depth.
